scripts.test:bdd:qa:all: npm run test:bdd:qa:chrome && npm run test:bdd:qa:firefox && npm run test:bdd:qa:webkit
scripts.test:bdd:prod:all: npm run test:bdd:prod:chrome && npm run test:bdd:prod:firefox && npm run test:bdd:prod:webkit
scripts.test:bdd:qa:all:parallel: concurrently --names "CHR,FF,WK" --kill-others "npm run test:bdd:qa:chrome" "npm run test:bdd:qa:firefox" "npm run test:bdd:qa:webkit"
scripts.test:bdd:prod:all:parallel: concurrently --names "CHR,FF,WK" --kill-others "npm run test:bdd:prod:chrome" "npm run test:bdd:prod:firefox" "npm run test:bdd:prod:webkit"
scripts.test:bdd:qa:all:report: npm run report:clean && npm run test:bdd:qa:all && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:bdd:prod:all:report: npm run report:clean && npm run test:bdd:prod:all && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:bdd:qa:all:parallel:report: npm run report:clean && npm run test:bdd:qa:all:parallel && npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:bdd:prod:all:parallel:report: npm run report:clean && npm run test:bdd:prod:all:parallel && npm run allure:generate
